samples.meaning: it doesn't matter; that's all right

items.en: to start to understand; to see the light

samples.meaning: have one's ideas straightened out; enlightened
samples.sentence: 孩子這個學期終於開竅了。
samples.pinyin: hái zǐ zhè gè xué qī zhōng yú kāi qiào le.
samples.en: The child finally came to his senses this semester.

samples.meaning: (of a child) begin to know things
samples.pinyin: háizi zǒngsuàn kāi qiào le yīdiǎn.
samples.en: The child has finally begun to understand a little.

samples.pinyin: qù nǐ de, wǒ méi nàme bèn!
samples.en: Go away, I'm not that stupid!

samples.pinyin: tā shìgè yúbèn zhī rén.
samples.en: He is a foolish person.

items.en: to exceed; to surpass; to transcend

samples.pinyin: wǒmen yào chāoyuè zìjǐ.
samples.en: We need to surpass ourselves.

samples.pinyin: tā de sīxiǎng chāoyuèle shídài.
samples.en: His thoughts surpassed the times.
samples.vi: Tư tưởng của anh ấy vượt thời đại.

samples.pinyin: shàn liáng jiù shì tā de běn xìng
samples.en: Kindness is his nature.

samples.sentence: 他無法改變自己的本性。
samples.pinyin: Tā wúfǎ gǎibiàn zìjǐ de běnxìng.
samples.en: He cannot change his own nature.

samples.pinyin: měi gèrén dōu tiānfù rénquán.
samples.en: Everyone is endowed with human rights.

samples.pinyin: tā zài yīnyuè shàng tiānfù dú hòu.
samples.en: She is naturally gifted in music.

samples.pinyin: yǒu tiānfù yě yào nǔlì.
samples.en: Having talent also requires hard work.

samples.pinyin: dì di yǒu chànggē de tiānfù.
samples.en: My younger brother has a talent for singing.

items.en: to be able to (as a result)

samples.meaning: to be enabled to; so that...can (or may)...
samples.sentence: 她的努力讓項目得以完成。
samples.pinyin: tā de nǔlì ràng xiàngmù déyǐ wánchéng.
samples.en: Her efforts made it possible for the project to be completed.
samples.vi: Nỗ lực của cô ấy khiến dự án được hoàn thành.

samples.meaning: to be enabled to; so that...can (or may)...
samples.sentence: 他們的閤作得以順利進行。
samples.pinyin: tāmen de hézuò déyǐ shùnlì jìnxíng.
samples.en: Their cooperation proceeded smoothly.
samples.vi: Hợp tác của họ được diễn ra suôn sẻ.

samples.meaning: in power; in office; at the helm of state
samples.sentence: 執政黨的黨風關繫到黨的生死存亡。
samples.pinyin: Zhízhèngdǎng de dǎngfēng guānxi dào dǎng de shēngsǐcúnwáng.
samples.en: A good work style is vital to the very existence of a party in power.

samples.meaning: in power; in office; at the helm of state
samples.pinyin: jìxù zhízhèng
samples.en: Continue in office; remain in power

samples.sentence: 公司的核/覈心理唸是創新。

samples.en: The company's core concept is innovation.

samples.sentence: 這個設計理唸非常獨特。

samples.sentence: 這個項目沒有什麼標準。

samples.pinyin: zhège cèshì de biāozhǔn hěn gāo.
samples.en: The standard of this test is very high.

samples.sentence: 準你的計劃，我們先去買菜。
samples.pinyin: zhǔn nǐ de jìhuà, wǒmen xiān qù mǎi cài.
samples.en: According to your plan, we'll go grocery shopping first.

samples.pinyin: zhège jìhuà zhǔn huì chénggōng.

samples.pinyin: nǐ de cāicè zhǔn shì duì de.
